instruction:
Given the integral $A=int_{0.25{pi}}^{1.25 pi} (sin^2 x +1)dx$, which of the following estimates is correct?

Options:
A. $pi/2 leq A leq 5pi/4$
B. $pi leq A leq 2 pi$
C. $ -pi leq A leq pi$
D. $pi/2 leq A leq 3pi/4$
E. $ 0 leq A leq pi/2$
F. $pi/2 leq A leq 7pi/4$
G. $pi/2 leq A leq 3pi/2$
H. $pi/2 leq A leq 2 pi$
I. $ 0 leq A leq pi$
J. $pi/2 leq A leq 9pi/4$
